detail.description: James McCann singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Gabriel Moreno scores. Nolan Arenado to 3rd.

James McCann doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Ketel Marte scores. Ildemaro Vargas scores.
James McCann homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.
